rationale: Exceptionally well-structured memo with clear headers separating affected vs. unaffected spending and a smart third section prompting specific exception categories. Specificity is strong: 45-day timeline, concrete examples (PRN pools, patient-to-staff ratios, software licenses), and a clear submission deadline. Language is mostly plain, though a few phrases lean slightly corporate ('proactive measure,' 'careful navigation,' 'continued dedication') — functional but not quite human. Brevity is good; minor redundancy in the closing and a couple of filler phrases ('of this nature') could be trimmed. Overall, this is a highly effective, ready-to-send internal memo that covers all prompt requirements with precision and logical flow.
